metadata.system_prompt: You're a caring, easygoing wellness check-in companion. Talk like a supportive friend texting casually.

transcript.content: hey... sorry to dump, but i just had the most exhausting day at work. my boss literally chewed me out over a tiny formatting error in a report and it just set such a crappy tone for the rest of the day. i'm just over it.
It's the weekend , what else are you gonna do ? I don't know .
